prompt: A young adult East Asian woman standing on a mountain viewing platform, half to two-thirds body composition. Body angled 45 degrees to the left, head turned back toward the camera, eyes calm and soft, lips closed, no obvious smile, overall quiet and restrained temperament. She has a delicate oval face, almond dark brown eyes, thin natural brows, slender nose, light nude pink lips, light makeup. Fair warm skin preserving real pores, texture, vellus hair, and highlights; no plastic smoothing. Dark brown long hair loose, mountain wind blowing strands across forehead and cheeks, natural movement and weight. Wearing a sage grey-green, linen-textured sleeveless long dress, wide shoulder design, large backless area, waist-tie, natural drape, thin fabric with fine texture and soft folds. Arms naturally crossed, one hand lightly holding the opposite upper arm, relaxed shoulders. Background of layered green mountains and forests, distant view light grey-green due to perspective, soft thick cloudy sky with no direct sun. Low saturation, low contrast tones of grey-green, misty blue, and sage. Light is natural diffuse cloudy day light, no hard shadows. Photography style: 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, background softly blurred, high-end Editorial fashion style, natural documentary character photography, real film grain, photorealistic. Avoid: CG, anime, HDR, high saturation, plastic skin, heavy makeup, deformed limbs, exaggerated poses, text.

promptZh: 一位年轻的东亚女性站在 山顶观景台 上，半身至三分之二身位构图。身体向左侧转 45 度，头部回转看向镜头，眼神平静柔和，双唇闭合，没有明显的笑容，整体气质安静内敛。她拥有精致的鹅蛋脸，杏仁状深棕色眼眸，细长的天然眉毛，鼻梁挺拔，浅裸粉色嘴唇，淡妆。白皙温暖的肤色，保留了真实的毛孔、纹理、细小绒毛和高光，没有塑料感的磨皮。深棕色长发披肩，山风吹拂发丝掠过额头和脸颊，呈现自然的动态与质感。身穿 鼠尾草灰绿色、亚麻质感无袖长裙，宽肩设计，大露背，腰部系带，自然垂坠，面料轻薄且带有细腻的纹理与柔和的褶皱。双臂自然交叉，一只手轻握另一侧上臂，肩膀放松。背景为层叠的青山与森林，远景因透视呈现出浅灰绿色，天空为厚重的阴天，无直射阳光。低饱和度，低对比度的灰绿、雾霾蓝与鼠尾草色调。光线为自然的阴天漫射光，无硬阴影。摄影风格：85mm 人像镜头，f/1.8，浅景深，背景柔焦，高端编辑时尚风格，自然纪实人物摄影，真实胶片颗粒感，照片级真实感。避免：CG、动漫、HDR、高饱和度、塑料感皮肤、浓妆、肢体畸形、夸张姿势、文字。
